title: Everything Manhunt
description: This fabric mod adds everything you would need for a manhunt, with twists that will make it more exciting! And of course, the classical compass tracker.
body:
This mod is created for the minecraft manhunt enthusiasts. It adds a variety of twists that benifits the runner, including op loot from mining a certain block, right clicking a certain item, or doing a certain pre-determined action; there are also twists that make it fair for both hunters and runners, or even put runners at a disadvantage!
AND OF COURSE, the classical compass for tracking the runner.
